name: on-call
description: Dr. Anthony Fauci's memoir — navigating the tension between science, politics, and public health through the lens of a physician who served six presidents across 50+ years of epidemics.
useCase: Crisis leadership, truth-telling to power, career mission design in public service, pandemic messaging strategy, resilience under attack.
knownRisks: Fauci remains a polarizing figure; some users may react strongly to his name
The book is an autobiography — perspectives are inevitably from one point of view
Government/public health contexts may not map cleanly to private-sector situations
